body.title: Cert debugger harness must mirror Igor's runtime env — silent 7B-vs-32B routing detour
body.result: load_igor_env_into_environ() helper added to env_sync.py; pe_chain_debugger.start() invokes it on entry; _call_tier2 logs routing decision (cloud vs local + model name) at INFO. 7 new tests, 173 pe_chain/env_sync/debugger tests pass. Standalone harnesses now mirror Igor's autonomous routing.
body.description:
Cert walk-02 substitute attempts 5/6/7 (2026-04-30) chased prompt-shape phantoms for hours because /tmp/run_walk_02.py did not set `IGOR_CLOUD_PROGRAMMING=true` in os.environ before calling pe_chain. Without that var, `_call_tier2` routes through local Ollama (qwen2.5:7b) instead of cloud OR (qwen-2.5-coder-32b). 7B can't do verbatim copy on the HYPOTHESIZE prompt; 32B can. The harness silently routed to the wrong model — every attempt failed identically because every attempt was hitting 7B. Igor's real pe_chain runs hit 32B (cfg sets the var via env_sync); the test rig diverged.

Fix: cert debugger / pe_chain_debugger usage from a fresh Python process should load Igor's switches.cfg + credentials.cfg before running, so routing matches autonomous behavior. Either:
- A tiny helper `wild_igor.cli.load_igor_env()` that reads the cfg files into os.environ
- OR: pe_chain_debugger.start() does the load on first call when running outside Igor's main process

Lesson generalizes beyond cert: any standalone tool that imports pe_chain (or cognition modules that route through tier.2) needs the same env shape. A silent route to a different model is one of the worst diagnostic-distorting bugs in the project.

**Affected files:** likely a new `wild_igor/cli/igor_env.py` helper + import in pe_chain_debugger or run_walk_02.py-style scripts.
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not. Add a logging line at routing time: 'pe_chain routing → model=<name>' at INFO so future divergence is visible in logs.
**Scope boundary:** IN — env-loading helper + integration with pe_chain_debugger. OUT — restructuring cfg loading; changing _call_tier2 routing logic; building a separate cert framework.
**Test plan:** unit test asserts the helper loads IGOR_CLOUD_PROGRAMMING from cfg + an integration test that uses pe_chain_debugger and asserts the cloud path is chosen.
